name: Chex® Muddy Buddies®
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure cereal into a large bowl and set aside.
2. Microwave chocolate chips, peanut butter, and margarine in a 1-quart microwavable bowl uncovered on High for 1 minute. Stir.
3. Continue microwaving for 30 seconds longer or until the mixture can be stirred smoothly. Stir in vanilla.
4. Pour the chocolate mixture over the cereal in the bowl and stir until evenly coated.
5. Transfer the mixture to a large plastic food-storage bag. Add powdered sugar and seal the bag.
6. Shake the bag until the mixture is well coated.
7. Spread on waxed paper to cool. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
Important: Because microwaves cook differently, times are approximate.
Range-Top Directions:
1. Measure cereal into a large bowl and set aside.
2. Heat chocolate chips, peanut butter, and margarine in a 1-quart saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently, until melted. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Continue as directed above.
Reduced-Fat Recipe: Omit margarine and vanilla.
High Altitude (3500-6500 ft): No changes.
